# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.

Prevent cloud monitoring.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: mysql
      MasterUsername: masteruser
      MasterUserPassword: password
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt RDSInstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId

  RDSInstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt EC2InstanceSecurityGroup.GroupId

  EC2InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: EC2 Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: my-load-balancer
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: my-target-group
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: 80
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Targets:
        - Id: !GetAtt EC2Instance.InstanceId

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.LoadBalancerArn
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - TargetId: !GetAtt TargetGroup.TargetGroupArn
          Type: forward

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Description: The ID of the VPC
